prompt: A black and white line art illustration of a cute fluffy alpaca wearing over-ear headphones. It has its eyes closed and a peaceful smile. It is holding a classic MP3 player with a click wheel, connected to the headphones by a wire. The device is resting near 2 stacked books. Floating around the character are 4 music notes and 1 heart. The style is minimalist, coloring book style, featuring thick black outlines on a pure white background.
